title: Hand-rolled JSON scanner: do not replace with serde_json
description: The custom JSON scanner in secretx-core exists because serde_json allocates plain String values for every field in the JSON object, leaving other fields' content in non-zeroized heap memory. The DO NOT replace with serde_json comment is accurate. Anyone suggesting to simplify should be shown: serde_json::from_str leaks all non-target field content into freed heap.
